title: dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. pulchella
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. pulchella, also known as the elegant orchid or spotted marsh orchid, is a subspecies of the terrestrial orchid Dactylorhiza incarnata. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. pulchella include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
